convergence_criteria.assessment_note: Criteria are declared before viewing results; passing requires both yield and mineral-N convergence.

common_management.irrigation_and_other_management: Retain ordinary_farmer baseline unchanged to isolate nitrogen warm-up effects.

fixed_180_reference.evidence_status: Previous reproducibility scenario only; not an observed or required rate.

statistical_constraint_central.evidence_status: 2012-2023 derived from official county fertilizer totals, balanced compound composition and total crop sown area. 2010-2011 use the earliest available 2012 intensity as an explicit spin-up fallback and must not be described as observed annual management.

statistical_constraint_low.evidence_status: Exploratory lower boundary, not observed management.

statistical_constraint_high.evidence_status: Exploratory upper boundary, not observed management.

data_integrity_rules: Use actual daily AgERA5 for every year and node; do not recycle a weather year.
Retain each HWSD soil unit and each AgERA5 node mapping.
Change only initial mineral-N multiplier and annual fertilizer-N scenario.
Do not modify cultivar or crop physiological parameters.
Do not reset soil water, mineral N, organic matter or residues between years.
Keep raw APSIM outputs for every scenario and case.
